summary: Iteration 59 - Driver Features Testing COMPLETE. All backend tests passed (13/14, 1 skipped). Frontend tests passed. Driver PIN authentication, location update, and order status APIs working correctly. PWA menu page loading correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/driver/login with correct PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/driver/login with wrong PIN returns 401 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/driver/login with unknown phone returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/driver/login without PIN returns 422 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/drivers creates driver with custom PIN - PASSED (BUG FIXED)
Backend: PUT /api/drivers/{driver_id} updates PIN - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/driver/update-location updates driver location - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/driver/update-location with invalid driver returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/driver/orders/{order_id}/status with non-existent order returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: PUT /api/driver/orders/{order_id}/status with invalid status returns 400 - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/driver/order-driver-info/{order_id} with non-existent order returns 404 - PASSED
Backend: POST /api/orders/{order_id}/assign-driver endpoint exists and validates - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/driver/orders returns driver's assigned orders - PASSED
Frontend: Driver App login page has phone and PIN fields - PASSED
Frontend: Driver App login with correct PIN shows dashboard - PASSED
Frontend: Driver App login with wrong PIN shows error message - PASSED
Frontend: Admin Delivery page has Add Driver button - PASSED
Frontend: Add Driver dialog has PIN field - PASSED
Frontend: Edit Driver dialog has PIN field - PASSED
Frontend: PWA menu.html redirects to /menu correctly - PASSED
Frontend: PWA menu page loads and shows restaurants - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Driver PIN authentication is working correctly - PIN is validated on login and not returned in responses
Custom PIN is now saved correctly when creating drivers via JSON body (BUG from iteration 58 is FIXED)
Driver location update API works without JWT authentication as designed
Driver order status update API correctly validates driver ownership of orders
PWA menu page correctly redirects from /menu.html to /menu
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_driver_features_iter59.py - Created comprehensive driver features test file
context_for_next_testing_agent: All driver features are working correctly. Driver PIN authentication is implemented and tested. The BUG from iteration 58 (custom PIN not saved when creating driver) has been FIXED. PWA menu page loads correctly. Test drivers: 07901234567 (PIN: 1234), 07800009876 (PIN: 9876).

driver_login_with_pin.notes: Returns driver info on success, 401 on wrong PIN, 404 on unknown phone

create_driver_with_pin.notes: Custom PIN is now saved correctly when creating driver via JSON body

update_driver_pin.notes: PIN can be updated via JSON body

driver_location_update.notes: Updates driver location without JWT authentication

driver_update_order_status.notes: Validates driver ownership and status values

get_driver_info_for_customer.notes: Returns driver info and location for customer tracking

driver_app_ui.notes: Login with phone and PIN, shows dashboard after successful login

admin_delivery_page.notes: Add/Edit driver dialogs have PIN fields

pwa_menu_page.notes: Redirects correctly and shows restaurant list

mocked_apis.push_notifications: Push notifications are logged to database instead of actually sent (requires VAPID keys)
